installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git curl
cd /mnt/server
if [ -d .git ]; then
  git pull
else
  if [ ! -z ${GIT_REPO} ]; then
    git clone ${GIT_REPO} .
  fi
fi
if [ -f package.json ]; then
  npm install
fi
